item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I believe the U.S. model places too much emphasis on individualism at the expense of broader societal well-being.

notes: Agent A consistently supports placing individual rights within a collective/social framework, while noting balance. Agent B consistently defends individual rights as foundational in the U.S.; turn 4 contains a visible concession toward Agent A's concern about excessive individualism, but turn 6 returns to a firm individual-rights framing. Turn 6 includes a non-English/non-Latin token in Agent B's English text: "集体".
